title: neoaulacolepis treutleri var. japonica
intro: Neoaulacolepis treutleri var. japonica is a species of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Neoaulacolepis treutleri var. japonica is used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
